title: Surgeon Vacancy at Johnson & Johnson India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Johnson & Johnson India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Johnson & Johnson India in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Johnson & Johnson India:
Johnson & Johnson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India!
